name: doing_business_as
description: The trade name, DBA, or 'Doing Business As' name of the establishment. This is often the store name

name: expiration_date
description: The date when the license or permit expires

name: jurisdiction
description: Government agency, state department, or commission issuing the license (e.g., Texas Alcoholic Beverage Commission, Florida DBPR)

name: legal_name
description: The official registered legal name of the entity, business, or individual holding the license (e.g., LLC, INC)

name: license_number
description: The unique alphanumeric license, permit, or certification number assigned to the business (e.g., 200034858, BEV1615666)

name: license_type
description: The specific class, category, or permit type of the issued license

name: location_address
description: The physical street address, city, state, and zip code of the licensed business location
